roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TN: PEDRO RENAN MEJIARAMOS/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD//X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON: ERIN CRANE/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX: 12-24-18 (60TH)/987,2/ORNAS/X: OVER DA OBJECTION/DEF:IS ORDERED RELEASED ON PRE-TRIALELECTRONIC MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
